text:
Created attachment 227809
patch

Switchboard Online Accounts Plug, allowing for configuration of online accounts within the elementary-switchboard application.

WWW: https://github.com/elementary/switchboard-plug-onlineaccounts

---

This component is useful for configuring accounts against the deskutils/elementary-calendar port, as well as potential future elementary ports. This requires bug #258406 to be merged.
